title: Nginx Static Files Example
summary: Serve static files directly from Nginx.
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Replace the sample URL prefix and root path before validation.
Put a real test file under the mapped directory before validation.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. The example follows the official Nginx root directive behavior, but it still requires nginx -t and a real static file on a staging host before use.
